layer_camera:
Shot with a professional full-frame mirrorless camera.
Lens: 85mm prime lens
Aperture: f/2.8
Shallow depth of field with natural bokeh.
layer_realism:
Ultra-photorealistic real-world photograph.
Physically accurate lighting, shadows, reflections, and materials.
Natural RAW color science and extremely detailed textures.
The image must be indistinguishable from a real photograph.
Avoid illustration, CGI rendering, cartoon style, artificial textures, or unrealistic lighting.
token_stack: Professional photography, full-frame mirrorless camera, 85mm prime lens, shallow depth of field, natural optical bokeh, realistic lens optics, physically accurate lighting, high dynamic range, natural color science, RAW photograph, subtle film grain, realistic micro-textures.
